title: Void Puddles
body:
The archival information available on the purple void puddles and energy particles are either extremely lacking or extremely guarded. This is what I was able to collect:

Monogon inquiry returns: Void Leaks are a heightened concentration of Void Energy. This substance is believed to be the "glue" which binds material matter. These leaks can appear for a variety of reasons known and unknown though most often found at sites of removed/destroyed static geometry. Cleaning and patching of leaks is possible through [REDACTED] however most will seal on their own, given enough time.

Void Energy off-gassing can pose a dangerous threat to entities due to [REDACTED]. Caution is advised. Please alert Monogon Clean-Up Crew or Trash Handlers if there is a suspected leak in your vicinity.
